name: simple-cdk-monorepo
description: Build on AWS without being an AWS expert. A convention-over-configuration layer on AWS CDK for Lambda, DynamoDB, AppSync (GraphQL), and Cognito.
author: Pujan Bhatta <pujanb8854@gmail.com> (https://github.com/pujaaan)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @simple-cdk/core && npm run build -w @simple-cdk/lambda -w @simple-cdk/dynamodb -w @simple-cdk/cognito -w @simple-cdk/rds -w @simple-cdk/outputs && npm run build -w @simple-cdk/appsync && npm run build -w simple-cdk
scripts.publish:all: npm run build && npm publish --workspaces --access public
